title: WILLAMALANE PARKS AND RECREATION DISTRICT - 211info
text: WILLAMALANE PARKS AND RECREATION DISTRICT WILLAMALANE PARKS AND RECREATION DISTRICT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides various recreation opportunities such as youth sports, adult and youth fitness classes, crafts, and community based recreation, including pool facilities. Operates and maintains parkland, including natural areas and hiking trails. 250 South 32nd Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (541) 736-4544 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 736-4544 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Springfield Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Public Parks Recreation Centers Swimming Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - WILLAMALANE FOOD PROGRAMS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS SPECIALTY MEDICINE - ADULT HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
